name: consumedPDURef
title: consumedPDURef
description: References a consumed PDU endpoint, which means a specific combination of consumer and provider for a service PDU on consumer side.

parameters.name: PDU
parameters.description: PDU of a service, determining the data type of the object.

row: Name Name of the consumed endpoint
Path Full path of the consumed endpoint (including namespaces)
ConsumerIndex Index of the consumer. Note that the index may change if consumers are added or removed.
ProviderIndex Index of the provider. Note that the index may change if providers are added or removed.

SubscriptionState State of the PDU subscription: Unavailable: there’s no connection between consumer and provider, the PDU cannot be subscribed. Available: the PDU can be subscribed, but currently is not subscribed. Subscribed: the PDU is subscribed.
<SignalName> Accesses the specified signal on the PDU.
